# DIY Poke Card Maker

> AI-powered trading card creator at https://www.diypokecard.com

## What is DIY Poke Card Maker?

DIY Poke Card Maker is an AI-powered web application that creates custom trading cards in seconds. Unlike traditional card makers that require manual template editing, this tool uses AI (DALL-E 3 and GPT-4o) to generate original artwork and card stats automatically.

## Two ways to create cards

### Create from Photo
Upload any photo and AI transforms it into an anime-style portrait, then places it on a professional Trainer card template. Choose from Supporter, Full Art, or EX card styles. No design skills needed.

### Design Your Own
Pick a color, animal, and superpower. AI generates a completely unique creature with original artwork and full card stats (HP, attacks, weakness, resistance) in about 15-20 seconds.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Is it free?
Yes. Your first card is completely free with no signup required. After that, affordable card packs are available starting from $0.99 for a 1-card pack, with volume discounts up to 10 cards.

### How is this different from pokecardmaker.net or pokecardgenerator.com?
Those sites are manual template editors where you upload your own image and fill in stats by hand. DIY Poke Card Maker uses AI to generate original anime-style artwork and auto-generate balanced card stats. You just pick options or upload a photo and AI does the rest.

### What technology does it use?
The app uses Azure OpenAI's DALL-E 3 for image generation and GPT-4o for card text creation. Card templates are rendered server-side using Node.js Canvas for professional quality output.

### Can I use the cards I create?
Yes. All AI-generated artwork is original and not copied from any existing characters. You own the cards you create and can download, share, or print them.

### Does it store my photos?
No. Photo uploads are processed transiently to generate your card and are not stored after the request completes.

## Technical Details
- Built with Node.js, Express, and SQLite
- AI: Azure OpenAI (DALL-E 3 + GPT-4o)
- Payments: Stripe (credit card + Alipay)
- Hosting: Railway
- Domain: www.diypokecard.com
